$comment: Reference copy. The version users actually install lives in the bucket repo: https://github.com/Jktfe/scoop-antchat (bucket/antchat.json). After each Release antchat workflow run, scoop/update-bucket.sh syncs version + hash into the bucket repo. The hash below stays as PLACEHOLDER until release time.
description: Lightweight ANT chat client — single binary, no Bun/Node required on host
